sections.title: Provide documentation
sections.summary:
### [*] 10/10 points: 20% or more of the public API has dartdoc comments

457 out of 459 API elements (99.6 %) have documentation comments.

Some symbols that are missing documentation: `binance_core.BinanceRequestBuilder.BinanceRequestBuilder.new`, `binance_core.CircuitBreakerRegistry.CircuitBreakerRegistry.new`.
